nasb.text: Because of the lightness of her harlotry, she polluted the land and committed adultery with stones and trees.

esv.text: Because she took her whoredom lightly, she polluted the land, committing adultery with stone and tree.

cnv.text: 因以色列把自己的淫行視作等閒，去與石頭木頭行淫，就把這地玷污了。

ccb.text: 以色列肆意淫乱，拜石头木头，玷污了土地。
